title: Scope-3 Supply-Chain Carbon Accounting & Emissions-Hotspot Detection (15 GHG-Protocol Categories with Spend-Based + Activity-Based + Hybrid Methodologies)
industry: Cross-industry — hotspot concentration rises among Materials & Apparel supply bases (CDP Disclosure Insight Action 2024 cites apparel Scope 3 multiples ~24× Scope 1+2 versus portfolio averages ~11.4×), Technology SaaS stacks (~8×), Pharmaceuticals (~7×), Financial Services portfolios dominated by Category 15 financed emissions (~700× operational baseline per PCAF 2024 narratives ) alongside multinational manufacturers juggling fifteen-category inventories where BCG-WEF Scope 3 Survey 2024 indicates organisations measure ~4.2 categories on average versus top-quartile ~11.5.
exclusions: Does not substitute statutory assurance opinions for Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive filings, Securities and Exchange Commission climate disclosures, Science Based Targets initiative validation attestations, nor ISO 14064 third-party verification worksheets — Splunk orchestrates telemetry lineage for procurement-led Scope 3 modelling distinct from UC-23.9.5 disclosure completeness dashboards and UC-23.9.6 Scope 2 renewable attribution narratives.
evidence: Saved search `scope3_upstream_hotspot_supplier_engagement_v4` exporting hashed supplier-master snapshots, Weekly Dashboard Studio PNG bundles, immutable CSV replicas of `supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv` plus `eeio_factors.csv`, archived beside audit-evidence indexes aligned to procurement close calendars.
dataSources: Primary **`index=business`** **`sourcetype=persefoni:inventory_event`**, **`persefoni:emission_factor_event`**, **`persefoni:supplier_engagement_event`** ingested via HTTPS **`GET`** **`https://api.persefoni.com/v1/organizations/{orgId}/inventories`** ( **`Authorization: Bearer`** tokens ; fields **`supplier_vendor_id`**, **`scope3_category`**, **`emissions_kg_co2e`**, **`methodology`**, **`factor_dataset_version`**, **`inventory_period`** ). Parallel **`watershed:measurement_event`**, **`watershed:reduction_initiative`** aligned to **`/api/v1/measurements`** Watershed Methodology splits (**activity**, **spend**, **supplier engagement** ). **`sweep:activity_event`** from Sweep **`/api/v1/scope3/categories/{categoryId}/activities`**. Procurement-backed **`emitwise:emission_event`**, **`greenly:footprint_event`**, **`plan_a:emission_event`** where SMEs pilot lighter tooling. Enterprise anchors **`microsoft:sustainability:emission_event`** (**Microsoft Sustainability Manager** **`/api/sustainability/v1.0/emissions`** ), **`sap:sfm:footprint_event`** (**SAP Sustainability Footprint Management** **`/api/sustainability/v1/sfm/footprints`** ), **`ibm:envizi:emission_event`**, **`salesforce:net_zero:emission_event`**, **`workiva:carbon_event`**, **`enablon:scope3_event`**. **`index=sustainability`** **`sphera:lca_event`** referencing **GaBi**/**ecoinvent** datasets plus **`climatiq:emission_estimate`** (**`https://api.climatiq.io/data/v1/estimate`** ). ERP **`ariba:spend_event`** (**`/api/v1/procurement/spend-analysis/categories`** ), **`coupa:spend_event`**, **`oracle:procurement_spend_event`** supply **`toplevel_supplier_id`**, **`UNSPSC_BUCKET`**, **`amount_usd`** feeding **`lookup eeio_factors.csv`** keyed EEIO intensities (**EXIOBASE**, **CEDA**, **EORA**, **WIOD** ). Supplementary **`glec_transport_factors.csv`** (**GLEC Framework v3.0** Smart Freight Centre ton-km factors ). Engagement overlays sourced REST (**CDP**, **SBTi Companies Taking Action API**, optional **EcoVadis** **`https://api.ecovadis.com/v3/companies/{companyId}/scorecard`** ) folded into **`supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv`**.
app: Splunk HTTP Event Collector (bundled with Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud ); Splunk DB Connect (`splunk_app_db_connect`, Splunkbase **2686** ); Splunk REST API Modular Input (Splunkbase **1546** ); Splunk Add-on for AWS S3 (Splunkbase **1876** ) optional for archived assurance bundles ; Heavy Forwarder Python workers polling Persefoni Watershed Sweep SAP Ariba Coupa Microsoft Sustainability Manager APIs.
spl:
| multisearch [
    search index=business sourcetype="persefoni:inventory_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=coalesce(supplier_vendor_id,vendor_guid)
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(coalesce(emissions_kg_co2e,inventory_line_kg_co2e,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(coalesce(scope3_category,ghgp_cat_code,"0"))
    | eval methodology=lower(coalesce(methodology,data_quality_band,"spend_based"))
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(emission_factor_source,factor_dataset_version,"PERSEFONI_EF")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=business sourcetype="watershed:measurement_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=counterparty_id
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(coalesce(co2e_kg,measurement_mass_kg,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(coalesce(scope3_category,category_code_int,"0"))
    | eval methodology=lower(coalesce(activity_or_spend_basis,"activity_based"))
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(methodology_detail,"WATERSHED_LIB")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=business sourcetype="ariba:spend_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=toplevel_supplier_id
    | eval spend_usd=tonumber(coalesce(amount_usd,invoiced_amount,"0"))
    | lookup eeio_factors.csv UNSPSC_BUCKET OUTPUT eeio_kg_per_usd factor_authority
    | eval kg_co2e=spend_usd*tonumber(coalesce(eeio_kg_per_usd,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=1
    | eval methodology="spend_based"
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(factor_authority,"EXIOBASE_PROXY")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=sustainability sourcetype="climatiq:emission_estimate" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=counterparty_hint
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(estimated_kg_co2e)
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(scope3_cat_hint)
    | eval methodology="hybrid_estimate"
    | eval emission_factor_source="CLIMATIQ_AGG"
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ]
| eval supplier_key=upper(trim(coalesce(supplier_vendor_id,"UNKNOWN")))
| eval cat_label=case(scope3_category=1,"C1",scope3_category=4,"C4",scope3_category=6,"C6",scope3_category=15,"C15",1=1,"CX")
| stats sum(kg_co2e) as line_kg values(methodology) as meths values(emission_factor_source) as efs by supplier_key scope3_category cat_label
| eventstats sum(line_kg) as portfolio_total_kg
| stats sum(line_kg) as supplier_total_kg values(cat_label) as cat_mix values(meths) as methods_used values(efs) as libraries_used dc(scope3_category) as cats_reported max(portfolio_total_kg) as portfolio_total_kg by supplier_key
| sort 0 - supplier_total_kg
| streamstats global=f sum(supplier_total_kg) as cum_kg
| eval cum_pct=round(100*cum_kg/nullif(portfolio_total_kg,0),3)
| eval pareto_band=case(cum_pct<=80,"top80",cum_pct<=95,"mid_tail","long_tail")
| lookup supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv supplier_key OUTPUTNEW cdp_grade sbti_target_class verified_ef_score double_count_symmetry_ok
| eval tier=case(cdp_grade IN ("A","A-","B") AND verified_ef_score>=70,"strong",verified_ef_score>=40,"moderate",1=1,"weak")
| table supplier_key supplier_total_kg cum_pct pareto_band cats_reported cat_mix methods_used libraries_used cdp_grade sbti_target_class verified_ef_score tier double_count_symmetry_ok
description: Multiplexes **`persefoni`**, **`watershed`**, **`ariba`** spend-with-EEIO, and **`climatiq`** hybrid estimates via **`multisearch`**, harmonises **`supplier_key`** identifiers, aggregates **`kg_co2e`** across **GHG Protocol Scope 3** categories **1–15**, computes cumulative **`cum_pct`** **Pareto** curves tagging **`pareto_band`** (**top80**, **mid_tail**, **long_tail**), then joins **`supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv`** overlays (**CDP** grades, **SBTi** target classes, **`verified_ef_score`**, **`double_count_symmetry_ok`**) so Procurement and Sustainability leaders isolate upstream emission hotspots, distinguish **spend-based**, **activity-based**, and **hybrid** methodologies, and guardrail double-counted supplier inventories versus UC-23.9.5 disclosure readiness scoring.
value: Chief Procurement Officers and Chief Sustainability Officers prioritise supplier-engagement budgets using physics-aligned **`supplier_total_kg`** tails enriched with **CDP**/**SBTi** posture rather than naive spend rankings alone — shrinking programme noise highlighted when MSCI Net Zero Tracker 2024 notes only **≈41%** MSCI ACWI constituents disclose any Scope 3 despite financed-emissions multiples (**≈700×** operational baselines per PCAF 2024 sector narratives ). Splunk hotspot cadences accelerate interventions aligned with **SB 253** forthcoming Scope 3 reporting (**2027** ), **EU CSRD ESRS E1** phased assurance, **GLEC** logistics optimisation plays (**ocean versus air freight ~130×** intensity differential ), and **Science Based Targets initiative** pathway tracking (**≈4.2%/yr** linear reduction for **1.5°C** targets versus **≈2.5%/yr** for **Well-Below 2°C** per **SBTi 2024 Progress Report** narratives ).
implementation: Mint **HEC** tokens plus **Splunk DB Connect** JDBC pulls toward **`ariba:spend_event`** staging tables ; configure REST modular inputs per vendor (**Persefoni**, **Watershed**, **Sweep**, **Climatiq** ) ; publish **`eeio_factors.csv`**, **`supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv`**, **`glec_transport_factors.csv`** under Knowledge governance ; schedule **`scope3_upstream_hotspot_supplier_engagement_v4`** weekly with **`inventory_period`** macros aligned to ERP closes ; route **`top80`** **`tier=weak`** alerts to Procurement-first distribution lists before Sustainability escalation.
visualization: **Dashboard Studio** trellis **`splunk.bar`** ranking **`supplier_total_kg`** coloured by **`pareto_band`** ; paired **`splunk.singlevalue`** portfolio **`portfolio_total_kg`** versus prior **`inventory_period`** ; **`splunk.table`** detailing **`methods_used`**, **`libraries_used`**, **`cdp_grade`**, **`sbti_target_class`** ; sparkline overlays plotting **`cum_pct`** versus supplier rank ; optional **`splunk.choropleth`** when **`Cat04`** logistics splits geographies referencing **GLEC** intensity legends cited narratively beside charts.

references.title: GHG Protocol — Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard
Science Based Targets initiative — Companies Taking Action API
Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials — Standard
SAP Help Portal — Sustainability Footprint Management API
Splunk — Use the HTTP Event Collector
United Kingdom DEFRA — Conversion factors publications
Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change — Sixth Assessment Report

knownFalsePositives:
Upstream hotspot dashboards spike when Procurement reroutes PO flows through reseller hubs **without** adjusting **`supplier_vendor_id`** master keys — Splunk interprets reseller anonymity as new mega-suppliers though physical flows stayed intact until **`mdm_vendor_bridge.csv`** harmonises ERP hierarchies referencing canonical **`UNSPSC_BUCKET`** mappings tied to spend taxonomy stewards.

Seasonal EEIO coefficient refreshes (**DEFRA June** drops versus locked **inventory_period** reporting ) rearrange **`spend_based`** tails absent behavioural procurement shifts — **`supplier_total_kg`** swings mimic supplier misconduct though finance merely adopted refreshed **`EXIOBASE`** vintage coefficients mirrored inside **`eeio_factors.csv`** governance commits.

Financed-emissions (**Category 15**) ingestion bursts when treasury uploads quarterly loan tapes denominated in **`USD`** alongside Procurement **`Cat01`** aluminium purchases keyed to identical surrogate IDs — **`cats_reported`** inflates dramatically though atmospheric exposures unchanged until namespaces separate **`bank_book`** versus **`supply_chain`** prefixes inside **`supplier_key`** enrichment macros referencing **PCAF** attribution guides.

**GLEC** logistics calculators feeding **`Cat04`** **`activity_based`** tonnes occasionally double-count tonne-kilometres already embedded inside **`emitwise`** supplier-specific factors — **`supplier_total_kg`** duplicates until **`dedupe_shipment_id`** lookups reconcile multimodal bills-of-lading hashed beside **`watershed:reduction_initiative`** storytelling artefacts.

**Climate TRACE** satellite-derived intensities blended through modular REST pulls reorder hotspots ±35% quarter-over-quarter purely because **`Climate TRACE`** **`api/v6`** asset revisions rebaseline maritime **`Cat04`** allocations unrelated to freight procurement diligence — annotate **`ClimateTRACE_schema_version`** tokens beside dashboards before accusing logistics leads.

**Joint venture** procurement feeds attributing **`Cat01`** purchased goods while JV minority partner simultaneously reports mirrored **`Scope 1+2`** totals keep **`double_count_symmetry_ok`** FALSE legitimately until Legal publishes contractual elimination memos referencing **GHG Protocol** boundary symmetry tables — Splunk persists WARNING hues though no malpractice occurred beyond consolidation optics.

**Intercompany** **`invoice_usd`** rows eliminated inside treasury consolidation feeds yet mirrored inside **`persefoni:inventory_event`** staging replicas inflate **`supplier_total_kg`** until **`intercompany_elim.csv`** suppresses mirrored **`PO_ID`** tuples keyed identical **`supplier_key`** aliases flagged **Finance close** references.

**Commodity hedge** tagging jitter reorganises **`UNSPSC_BUCKET`** quarterly mappings rolling **`lookup`** joins — **`supplier_total_kg`** reshuffles tail vendors absent commodity consumption shifts until Procurement taxonomy councils freeze **`UNSPSC_BUCKET`** crosswalk tables referencing **SAP Ariba** commodity dictionaries.

**Parallel pilots** landing **`workiva:carbon_event`** duplicates **`persefoni:inventory_event`** totals during Sustainability tooling migrations masquerade as doubled hotspots until modular-input **`disabled=1`** flags propagate across Heavy Forwarders — **`tier`** badges oscillate weak-strong absent atmospheric drift purely due to ingest duplication noise.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or Splunk Cloud roles covering **index=business**, **index=sustainability**, lookups (**supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv**, **eeio_factors.csv**, **mdm_vendor_bridge.csv**, **glec_transport_factors.csv**) beside Science Based Targets initiative corridor spreadsheets.
• Heavy Forwarder terminating HTTPS toward Persefoni **https://api.persefoni.com/v1/organizations/{orgId}/inventories**, Watershed **/api/v1/measurements**, Sweep **/api/v1/scope3/categories/{categoryId}/activities**, SAP Ariba **/api/v1/procurement/spend-analysis/categories**, Coupa **/api/v3.0/spend_data**, Microsoft Sustainability Manager **/api/sustainability/v1.0/emissions**, Climatiq **https://api.climatiq.io/data/v1/estimate**, IBM Envizi **/api/envizi/v1/data**, Salesforce Net Zero Cloud relays — throttle OAuth2 polite-rate limits before modular inputs burst vendor REST tiers.
• HTTP Event Collector tokens landing **persefoni:inventory_event**, **persefoni:emission_factor_event**, **persefoni:supplier_engagement_event**, **watershed:measurement_event**, **watershed:reduction_initiative**, **sweep:activity_event**, **emitwise:emission_event**, **microsoft:sustainability:emission_event**, **sap:sfm:footprint_event**, **ibm:envizi:emission_event**, **salesforce:net_zero:emission_event**, **workiva:carbon_event**, **enablon:scope3_event**, optional **sphera:lca_event** bridging GaBi / ecoinvent datasets.
• Splunk DB Connect (**Splunkbase 2686**) JDBC extracts emitting **ariba:spend_event**, **coupa:spend_event**, **oracle:procurement_spend_event** rows with **toplevel_supplier_id**, UNSPSC_BUCKET, **amount_usd** mapped to GHG Protocol Scope 3 Category integers **1–15**.
• Splunk REST API Modular Input (**Splunkbase 1546**) harvesting CDP questionnaire metadata and Science Based Targets initiative Companies Taking Action JSON — enrichment only, never substitute for inventory tonnes.
• Governance memo documenting double-count avoidance between buyer Scope 3 Category 1 purchased goods and supplier Scope 1+2 inventories — populate **double_count_symmetry_ok** after Legal confirms organisational boundaries.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
Wire modular inputs so **persefoni:inventory_event** exposes **supplier_vendor_id**, **scope3_category**, **emissions_kg_co2e**, **methodology** labels (**spend_based**, **activity_based**, **hybrid_estimate**), **factor_dataset_version** citing DEFRA Conversion Factors 2024, EPA GHGRP hubs, IPCC AR6 sector tables, ecoinvent v3.10 datasets, GLEC Framework v3.0 logistics intensities, WattTime marginal grid forecasts when geography permits.
Hydrate **watershed:measurement_event** with **counterparty_id**, **co2e_kg**, **activity_or_spend_basis**, **methodology_detail** so Splunk distinguishes Watershed Methodology activity slices versus blended libraries.
Publish **lookup eeio_factors.csv** keyed UNSPSC_BUCKET exposing **eeio_kg_per_usd** sourced from EXIOBASE / CEDA / EORA / WIOD EEIO matrices chosen by Sustainability — stamp **factor_authority** and functional currency assumptions when treasury pivots USD versus EUR closes.
Land **climatiq:emission_estimate** rows inside **index=sustainability** with **estimated_kg_co2e**, **counterparty_hint**, **scope3_cat_hint** bridging Cloud Calculator outputs before multisearch merges supplier totals — align inventory_period macros with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management **/api/sustainability/v1/sfm/footprints** reconciliation cadences when hybrid denominators borrow bill-of-materials masses.
Maintain **supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv** blending CDP Climate grades (A–F ladder), CDP Supplier Engagement Rating cues, SBTi validation classes (**1.5°C**, Well-Below **2°C**, Net-Zero Standard commitments per SBTi progress narratives), EcoVadis carbon modules where licensed, plus **verified_ef_score** when third-party assurance covers supplier-specific emission factors — never elevate questionnaire badges above physics tonnes.

**Step 2 — Create the search and alert**
Paste the canonical SPL into saved search **scope3_upstream_hotspot_supplier_engagement_v4** scheduled Monday **06:15 UTC** after ERP procurement closes.

```spl
| multisearch [
    search index=business sourcetype="persefoni:inventory_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=coalesce(supplier_vendor_id,vendor_guid)
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(coalesce(emissions_kg_co2e,inventory_line_kg_co2e,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(coalesce(scope3_category,ghgp_cat_code,"0"))
    | eval methodology=lower(coalesce(methodology,data_quality_band,"spend_based"))
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(emission_factor_source,factor_dataset_version,"PERSEFONI_EF")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=business sourcetype="watershed:measurement_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=counterparty_id
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(coalesce(co2e_kg,measurement_mass_kg,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(coalesce(scope3_category,category_code_int,"0"))
    | eval methodology=lower(coalesce(activity_or_spend_basis,"activity_based"))
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(methodology_detail,"WATERSHED_LIB")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=business sourcetype="ariba:spend_event" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=toplevel_supplier_id
    | eval spend_usd=tonumber(coalesce(amount_usd,invoiced_amount,"0"))
    | lookup eeio_factors.csv UNSPSC_BUCKET OUTPUT eeio_kg_per_usd factor_authority
    | eval kg_co2e=spend_usd*tonumber(coalesce(eeio_kg_per_usd,"0"))
    | eval scope3_category=1
    | eval methodology="spend_based"
    | eval emission_factor_source=coalesce(factor_authority,"EXIOBASE_PROXY")
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ] [
    search index=sustainability sourcetype="climatiq:emission_estimate" earliest=-395d@d
    | eval supplier_vendor_id=counterparty_hint
    | eval kg_co2e=tonumber(estimated_kg_co2e)
    | eval scope3_category=tonumber(scope3_cat_hint)
    | eval methodology="hybrid_estimate"
    | eval emission_factor_source="CLIMATIQ_AGG"
    | fields _time supplier_vendor_id kg_co2e scope3_category methodology emission_factor_source
  ]
| eval supplier_key=upper(trim(coalesce(supplier_vendor_id,"UNKNOWN")))
| eval cat_label=case(scope3_category=1,"C1",scope3_category=4,"C4",scope3_category=6,"C6",scope3_category=15,"C15",1=1,"CX")
| stats sum(kg_co2e) as line_kg values(methodology) as meths values(emission_factor_source) as efs by supplier_key scope3_category cat_label
| eventstats sum(line_kg) as portfolio_total_kg
| stats sum(line_kg) as supplier_total_kg values(cat_label) as cat_mix values(meths) as methods_used values(efs) as libraries_used dc(scope3_category) as cats_reported max(portfolio_total_kg) as portfolio_total_kg by supplier_key
| sort 0 - supplier_total_kg
| streamstats global=f sum(supplier_total_kg) as cum_kg
| eval cum_pct=round(100*cum_kg/nullif(portfolio_total_kg,0),3)
| eval pareto_band=case(cum_pct<=80,"top80",cum_pct<=95,"mid_tail","long_tail")
| lookup supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv supplier_key OUTPUTNEW cdp_grade sbti_target_class verified_ef_score double_count_symmetry_ok
| eval tier=case(cdp_grade IN ("A","A-","B") AND verified_ef_score>=70,"strong",verified_ef_score>=40,"moderate",1=1,"weak")
| table supplier_key supplier_total_kg cum_pct pareto_band cats_reported cat_mix methods_used libraries_used cdp_grade sbti_target_class verified_ef_score tier double_count_symmetry_ok
```

How this search behaves — **multisearch** unions Persefoni inventory pulls, Watershed measurement pulls, procurement EEIO tails, and Climatiq bridging estimates before **coalesce** harmonises uppercase **supplier_key** identifiers shared across ERP vendor masters versus SaaS surrogate IDs.
The inner **stats** pass retains category fidelity (**scope3_category**, **cat_label**) so downstream **supplier_total_kg** supports hotspot narratives distinguishing Category **15** financed emissions tails versus Category **4** upstream logistics intensity spikes aligned with Smart Freight Centre illustrative ocean versus air spreads (~130× differential cited beside dashboards narratively).
**eventstats** computes **portfolio_total_kg** once per multisearch union enabling cumulative **cum_pct** percentages — **streamstats** accumulates **cum_kg** after sorting descending supplier totals implementing classic **Pareto** hotspot doctrine (~80% mass concentrated among handful of upstream partners ).
**lookup supplier_engagement_scorecard.csv** overlays CDP / SBTi / assurance posture via **tier** without altering kg totals — Procurement chase lists emerge when **pareto_band** equals **top80** yet **tier** remains **weak**.
Throttle noisy alerts when **cats_reported** equals **1** because tail vendors occasionally spike purely due to single-category uploads during pilots.

**Step 3 — Validate**
Spot-check suppliers across **top80** versus **long_tail** in Persefoni, Watershed, Sweep UIs — reconcile inventory_period and FX assumptions (functional currency versus USD).
Contrast **ariba:spend_event** EEIO kg totals versus SAP Ariba Spend Analysis on UNSPSC_BUCKET — taxonomy drift explains gaps before blaming suppliers.
Cross-check **double_count_symmetry_ok** with assurance packs per GHG Protocol symmetry rules — JV or franchise splits need Legal memos.
Validate **cum_pct** versus FP&A Pareto macros — dedupe **supplier_key** via **mdm_vendor_bridge.csv**.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Publish Dashboard Studio boards layering hotspot leaderboard panels (**supplier_total_kg**, **cum_pct**, **pareto_band**, **tier**, **methods_used**) with contextual notes referencing GLEC ton-km factors when Category **4** dominates upstream logistics storytelling.
Schedule alerts **where pareto_band="top80" AND tier="weak"** routed first to Chief Procurement Officer mailboxes referencing California SB 253 Scope 3 timelines (**2027**) and EU CSRD ESRS E1 assurance phasedowns — escalate Chief Sustainability Officer only after ERP latency hypotheses clear.
Archive immutable lookup hashes alongside PNG exports inside ISO-oriented evidence libraries — segregate dashboards from UC-23.9.6 renewable tariff attribution visuals so reviewers never confuse megawatt-hour procurement proofs with upstream hotspot tonnes.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting misleading Splunk indicators**
• Vendor merge waves duplicate supplier aliases inflating **supplier_total_kg** until **mdm_vendor_bridge.csv** harmonises ERP masters — hotspots reshuffle without atmospheric shifts.
• Annual DEFRA / EEIO coefficient refreshes swing spend_based tails absent procurement behaviour changes — annotate **factor_year** beside charts before accusing suppliers.
• Joint venture procurement feeds attributing Category **1** tonnes while JV partner reports mirrored Scope **1+2** totals leave **double_count_symmetry_ok** FALSE legitimately until consolidation memos clarify elimination rules per GHG Protocol Corporate Standard chapters.
• PCAF Category **15** financed-emissions uploads occasionally collide with procurement surrogate IDs — bifurcate namespaces (**bank_book** versus **supply_chain**) before interpreting hotspot spikes.
• GLEC logistics calculators emitting Category **4** activity_based totals plus EEIO freight charges duplicate tonne-kilometres unless **dedupe_shipment_id** lookups suppress overlaps across Watershed reduction narratives.
• Climatiq surrogate rows labelled **counterparty_hint="ALLOCATED"** flatten attribution — enrich surrogate IDs before trusting weak **tier** badges alone.
• SBTi validation churn toggles target-class strings absent footprint shifts — freeze lookup refresh timestamps beside dashboards for narrative honesty.
• Franchise royalties miscoded as waste versus franchise categories scramble **cats_reported** until UNSPSC governance councils intervene — taxonomy hygiene beats SPL tweaks.
• Climate TRACE satellite intensity revisions reorder maritime hotspots quarterly unrelated to procurement diligence — stamp Climate TRACE schema versions beside ingest pipelines referencing **https://api.climatetrace.org/v6/assets** payloads when modular REST pulls enabled.
• Intercompany eliminations suppressed inside treasury spend yet mirrored inside duplicate inventory feeds double **supplier_total_kg** until **intercompany_elim.csv** keyed **PO_ID** suppresses mirrored invoices.
• Parallel pilots indexing Workiva Carbon feeds alongside Persefoni feeds duplicate totals until modular inputs honour disabled flags — hotspots double purely due to ingest duplication noise.
grandmaExplanation: We trace purchases and shipments across long vendor chains, spotlight which partners concentrate climate harm, and compare disclosure clues so footprint totals stay honest across buyer and seller books without counting the same tonne twice.
